name: Broccoli Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups chicken breasts without skin, chopped and cooked
1/2 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions and drain.
3. Prepare the bottom of a 2 1/2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine noodles, chicken, onions, and broccoli.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine soup, milk, cheese, basil, salt, and pepper. Stir in noodle mixture.
6. Pour the entire mixture into the prepared dish.
7. Bake, covered for 40 minutes.
